name: Jacob
text: Hello! Recycling is not only about trash... it's about giving materials a second life.

name: Jacob
text: When we recycle metal, we reduce the need to mine new raw materials from the Earth.

name: Jacob
text: Producing new products from recycled materials usually requires much less energy.

name: Jacob
text: Landfills take up a lot of space and can release harmful gases into the atmosphere.

name: Jacob
text: By separating waste correctly, we make the recycling process much more efficient.

name: Jacob
text: Every recycled item is one less item polluting forests, oceans, and cities.

name: Jacob
text: Recycling is a simple habit, but its impact can last for generations.
